# @lesto/env

> Lesto's typed, validated environment — a defineEnv schema that fails fast at boot and hands back frozen, fully-typed values.

Part of **[Lesto](https://lesto.run)**, the batteries-included, agent-native fullstack framework.

```bash
bun add @lesto/env
```

[Docs](https://docs.lesto.run/batteries/env) · [Agent-readable docs](https://docs.lesto.run/llms.txt)
